mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(hr.base_time, '%H시') AS label, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(hr.value_actual), 0), 2) AS value FROM hourly_report hr INNER JOIN inverter i ON hr.inverter_id = i.id INNER JOIN plant p ON i.plant_id = p.id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} AND DATE(hr.base_time) = #{selectedDate} GROUP BY HOUR(hr.base_time), DATE_FORMAT(hr.base_time, '%H시') ORDER BY HOUR(hr.base_time)

SELECT CASE gl.weather_code WHEN '01' THEN '맑음' WHEN '02' THEN '구름' WHEN '03' THEN '흐림' WHEN '04' THEN '비' WHEN '05' THEN '눈' ELSE '기타' END AS label, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(gl.perfomance_ratio), 0), 2) AS value FROM generation_log gl INNER JOIN inverter i ON gl.inverter_id = i.id INNER JOIN plant p ON i.plant_id = p.id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} AND DATE(gl.base_time) = #{selectedDate} GROUP BY gl.weather_code ORDER BY gl.weather_code
